verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father I see that You Were drawing A line in the sand I wanna be standing on Your side Holding Your hand So let Your Kingdom come Let it live in me This is my prayer, this is my plea

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the worshipers arise Let His sons And His daughters sing I'm surrendering my all I'm surrendered to my King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Father I hear it growing louder The songs of Your redeemed As the Saints of every nation Are awakening to sing From our hearts There comes an anthem Hear our praises ring This is our song, A song to our King
